gql.description: gql GraphQL client construction used to establish outbound GraphQL access.

graphql_client.description: Construction of gql clients used for outbound GraphQL operations.
Construct a gql Client through its public package export or canonical client module.
graphql_client.notes: High confidence requires the detector's direct import/alias provenance check to resolve the constructor to gql.Client or gql.client.Client; local Client calls are rejected. Query parsing via gql(...), transport setup, and execute instance methods are intentionally excluded.
